description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 1, 2026 at 9:48 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving a heavy truck on Interstate 10 near the Interstate 110 interchange. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped in manual mode facing northwest in the rightmost lane on Interstate 10 in a queue of traffic. While the 
Waymo AV was stopped, a heavy truck tractor that was initially stopped directly in front of the Waymo AV reversed, and the rear of the 
heavy truck tractor made contact with the front of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was 
not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
